column1: # ZAP baseline policy. FAIL and WARN entries block because the workflow does not use -I.

column3: The local Vite preview and API are HTTP-only test targets; production TLS terminates outside this local scan.
The public Istari logo is embedded as base64 image data; it contains no secret or sensitive content.
The frontend is intentionally a client-rendered modern web application.
Sec-Fetch-Dest is a browser request header; ZAP's synthetic requests do not send it and the server cannot add it.
